/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libtermin_base.so -o libtermin_base.so CMakeFiles/termin_base.dir/src/tc_log.c.o CMakeFiles/termin_base.dir/src/tc_value.c.o CMakeFiles/termin_base.dir/src/tc_pool.c.o CMakeFiles/termin_base.dir/src/tc_resource_map.c.o CMakeFiles/termin_base.dir/src/tgfx_intern_string.c.o CMakeFiles/termin_base.dir/src/trent/trent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/termin_base.dir/src/trent/trent_path.cpp.o CMakeFiles/termin_base.dir/src/trent/string_ext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/termin_base.dir/src/trent/json.cpp.o CMakeFiles/termin_base.dir/src/trent/yaml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/termin_base.dir/src/settings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/termin_base.dir/src/tc_value_trent.cpp.o
